title: alchemilla alpina var. grossidens
intro: Alchemilla alpina var. grossidens is a variety of the Alpine lady's mantle plant, a flowering plant species belonging to the Rosaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Alchemilla alpina var. grossidens include treating skin irritations, wounds, and menstrual disorders due to its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of Alchemilla alpina var. grossidens include infusions and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to alleviate various health issues.
